_note: Fill all placeholder values before starting a research session. This file scopes all research to a specific niche and target account.

niche.name: NICHE_NAME (e.g., sobriety, fitness, productivity)
niche.description: NICHE_DESCRIPTION — a 1-2 sentence description of the target audience and their core concern

targetAccount._phaseNote: phase-1 (0-1K), phase-2 (1K-10K), phase-3 (10K+). Determines which format tiers to prioritize.

targetApp.name: YOUR_APP_NAME
targetApp.description: APP_DESCRIPTION — what the app does in one sentence

research._formatNote: Which format tiers to focus on. Adjust based on currentPhase and brand strategy.
research._premiumNote: Premium brand accounts to study for production quality reference, even if outside the niche.
